series_metadata.series_title: Video Lottery Terminal Technology Provider Application/Agreement
series_metadata.series_description: Records contain all current Video Lottery Terminal Technology Provider Applications and Agreements. Each Application and Agreement identifies the business ownership, name, address, credit references, answers to questions pertinent to O.R.C. 3770 and applicant’s notarized signature. The Application and Agreement is used for approval of Video Lottery Terminal Technology Provider License to do business with Ohio Lottery Licensed Video Lottery Terminal Racetracks

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in a secure area with access limited persons who need records carry out their duties and responsibilities, which is continually updated and maintained duration of active Video Lottery Terminal Technology Provider License and two (2) years license cancellation date
